audit_items.proof_trace: Solady's `mulDiv` (floor division) at L793-795 computes `floor((startPM - endPM) * elapsedTime / duration)`, which is ≤ `(startPM - endPM)` whenever `elapsedTime ≤ auctionDuration`, so `priceMultiplier = startPM - decayAmount ≥ endPM` by arithmetic. Both preconditions hold: `_applyAssetParamsUpdates` (L653-657) enforces `startPM ≥ endPM` at config time, and L785 caps `elapsedTime` at `auctionDuration` inside the function (all three callers also independently revert or validate before calling). The design intent is explicitly documented in the struct comment (L130-134).
